raw_consumer_statement:
To : Consumer Financial Protection Bureau ( CFPB ) & XXXX XXXX XXXX  ( XXXX  ) Complaint Details : I am filing this urgent complaint against American Express ( Amex ) for systemic violations of Regulation Z ( Truth in Lending Act ) and failure to maintain legally required dispute records. This concerns Amex 's deliberate concealment of a valid dispute ( Reference XXXX ) after I initiated small claims litigation against them. 

Chronology of Violations : Original Dispute Closure ( XX/XX/year>XXXX  ) : Illegally closed my {$1400.00} dispute for " Oceanpayment * XXXX XXXX  '' despite valid grounds ( Cancelled Service/Non-Delivery ). 
( Evidence : XXXX XXXX showing closure ) Reopening & Second Closure ( XX/XX/XXXX - XX/XX/year>XXXX  ) : Re-opened case on XX/XX/XXXX with Resolution Date XX/XX/year>. 
Closed again on XX/XX/year>XXXX  without justification. 
( Evidence : Screenshot 3 with Resolution Date ) Evidence Tampering ( Current Status ) : Upon filing small claims litigation, Amex DELETED THE DISPUTE FROM ALL PORTALS ( Screenshots XXXX ) : Not listed under " View Open Disputes '' Absent from " View Closed Disputes '' Violation : 15 U.S.C. 1666 requires retention of dispute records for 24 months. 

Key Violations : 12 CFR 1026.13 ( c ) ( 2 ) : Failure to provide written explanation for closure 12 CFR 1026.13 ( e ) : Refusal to correct billing error 15 U.S.C. 1692f ( 8 ) : Concealing/falsifying records related to consumer disputes Evidence Spoliation : Removal of critical evidence post-litigation filing Demands : Immediate reinstatement of Dispute XXXX in my online portal Written confirmation of the dispute 's full history {$1400.00} credit + statutory penalties CFPB investigation into Amex 's systemic deletion of disputed transactions Attached Evidence : [ Screenshot 1 ] Closed disputes list ( no XXXX ) [ Screenshot 2 ] Open disputes list ( no XXXX ) [ Screenshot 3 ] Original dispute details and resolution date This pattern confirms Amex is intentionally obscuring evidence to undermine my small claims case. I demand regulatory intervention to preserve these records as evidence for my lawsuit. 

Signed, XXXX XXXX
